visual_rule: Fire should read as one hot combustion subject: a white-yellow ignition core, orange-red flame body, ember sparks, and a restrained smoke tail. The impact bloom is the hero; the travel streak is only a readable connector.

assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style fire attacks. Show only a compact ignition knot with a bright white-yellow core, orange-red shell tongues, and a few ember sparks. No character, no Pokemon body, no arena, no UI, no text, no watermark, and no frame. Keep the silhouette tight, readable, premium, and easy to composite in a battle overlay. Use a hot ignition pulse rather than fireworks.
assets.negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no solid backdrop, no beam, no lightning arcs, no decorative rings, no giant fireball head
assets.notes: Compact pre-fire knot with a strong hot core.

assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style fire attacks. Show only a short directional flame streak with a white-yellow spine, orange-red outer tongues, and a tapered tail. No character, no Pokemon body, no arena, no UI, no text, no watermark, and no frame. Keep the shape readable in a side-on battle overlay and make it clearly fire, not lightning or a beam. Use controlled combustion motion rather than fireworks.
assets.negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no solid backdrop, no laser beam, no electric arcs, no decorative rings, no giant fireball head
assets.notes: Directional support layer for attacks that need a readable launch path.

assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style fire attacks. Show only a compact contact bloom with a bright white-yellow center, petal-like orange-red flame tongues, ember flecks, and a restrained smoke rim. No character, no Pokemon body, no arena, no UI, no text, no watermark, and no frame. Keep the hit legible at small size and make the bloom feel premium, hot, and battle-ready. Use a concentrated impact pulse rather than fireworks.
assets.negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no solid backdrop, no beam, no lightning arcs, no decorative rings, no fog wall, no giant fireball head
assets.notes: Primary impact asset and main visual subject.

assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style fire attacks. Show only fading ember smoke, soft ash wisps, and a few dim sparks. No character, no Pokemon body, no arena, no UI, no text, no watermark, and no frame. Keep the residue low contrast, elegant, and easy to composite after the hit bloom clears. Use a warm smoky aftermath rather than a flame burst.
assets.negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no solid backdrop, no beam, no lightning arcs, no decorative rings, no bright fireball, no fog wall
